list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT project FROM sessions ORDER BY project

list.name: session
list.query: SELECT session_id AS __value, session_id || ' (' || started_at::date || ')' AS __text FROM sessions WHERE project = '$project' AND is_subagent = false ORDER BY started_at DESC

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.timestamp, m.prompt_type, m.tool_name, LEFT(m.prompt_text, 120) AS prompt_preview, COALESCE(t.input_tokens, 0) AS input, COALESCE(t.output_tokens, 0) AS output, COALESCE(t.cache_read_tokens, 0) AS cache_read FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session' ORDER BY m.timestamp
SELECT SUM(t.input_tokens) AS total_input FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session'
SELECT SUM(t.output_tokens) AS total_output FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session'
SELECT SUM(t.cache_read_tokens) AS total_cache_read FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session'
SELECT COUNT(m.message_uuid) AS message_count FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session'

SELECT m.timestamp AS time, m.prompt_type, COALESCE(t.input_tokens, 0) + COALESCE(t.output_tokens, 0) AS tokens FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session' ORDER BY m.timestamp
